only criticisms would be we wasn t aware prior that we would have to pay a deposit of 50 per night stayed There wasn t any plugs near the bed and didn t have a main light in the bedroom so was quite dark would have liked complementary bottled water in the rooms as you couldn t turn air con off our throats were a bit dry   From arrival we were made to feel so welcome by all the staff check in was very easy and quick Our room was very spacious had everything we needed loved the fact there was a sound system in the bathroom very cool Breakfast was included in our stay and we would highly recommend it it was delicious it was set up like a buffet and it was the best we d ever had any where good quality food and fresh as well Thank you to the Canary Wharf Hilton team we had such a good stay we didn t want to leave

Beware that you have to pay a deposit of 50 quid a night while other hotels just hold your credit card liable at this hotel you will actually have to pay that amount say you are staying for 2 nights thats 100 quid you will get back when you checkout I stayed for 4 nights and im not from UK so having 200 pounds just sitting there until my departure wasnt that pleasant   The staff were amazing and not just at the reception Any employee was able to help me with all the questions i could have had Don t expect a lot from the standard rooms not the executive a solid 4 Had everything a person might need but the furniture was a bit worn out not everywhere More than good for a couple of days stay Location was excellent close to the Canary Wharf Jubilee line station plus there are 3 big malls in just 3 minutes walk from the hotel

Nothing to comment on   This hotel was picked for its location to O2 So great location for tube and DLR Hotel struck me as very clean and modern As it was just used for the room didn t t spend too much time there so hotel perceived as functional rather than cosy or quaint etc Again for this reason no real comments to make on wifi or other facilities

Being chased after by the barman saying we hadn t paid when we had Highly embarrassing The bar area could have been cleaner No parking spaces left Crazily hot in the bar area   The breakfast was nice with a large variety and the bedroom was spacious

There was no parking available Ordered a hot chocolate from room service it was cold when it arrived   The room was spacious the shower was awesome and the bed was delightfully comfy Great selection of foods and drinks available at breakfast Staff were very friendly and helpful

No complaints about this hotel   When checking in we were told we had been given a free room upgrade to an Executive room which included free afternoon tea in the executive lounge which was very nice From this lounge we had a lovely view of the river at dusk The hotel is also a short walk to the tube and one stop from the O2 arena which was the purpose of our visit At breakfast I enjoyed a glass of chilled water with cucumber and mint in it Very refreshing
The only problem we had was car parking Had to use an alternative car park which was closed when we went to collect car the next morning However it was fortunately resolved   Everything

There was nothing that could have been better with the hotel the room the staff or the breakfast I wouldn t hesitate to mention it if there were   The room was spacious and the beds were so comfy you didn t want to get up The bathroom was huge and had a walk in shower and bath The breakfast choices were limitless A huge selection of cooked breakfasts a choice of at least four speciality freshly baked breads muffins bagels croissants pain au raisin almond croissants chocolate croissant twists Bircher porridge fresh fruits I could go on for ever The drinks were the same endless list cranberry juice fruit juices coffee tea sparkling and still mineral waters all in abundance

No bad points I couldn t even be really picky no faults at all   The hotel staff very friendly and helpful it was my partners birthday and they made the room very special with balloons cake and wine The room was clean and very spacious Shower powerful Quite location so slept well There was a great selection at breakfast In fact that was fantastic The cooked breakfast wasn t really greasy Location was great close to the tube but quiet away from all the hussle and busle of London Great hotel and great value for money in London Breakfast included in the room prices
Everything was so lovely from checking in to checking out really lovely The staff reception bar staff restaurant staff all brilliant and very professional

the curry I ordered in the evening was warm nearly cold this is disappointing as the flavour was really good   as soon as I entered the building felt welcomed THE staff where lovely and so helpful my room was so lovely I was only staying for our one night and I was dead impressed everything was so clean and the bed was comfy when we came back to the hotel during the night we where hungry as we went to a gig that night I ordered room service we had the curry however when it got to put room it was warm well the rice was warm I was disappointed with this however the curry it s self was delicious THE next morning we had breakfast and it was so nice I had a fry up but the variety of different foods was nice EG fruit fry up different small breads made muffins and cossants

Nothing  Very friendly staff lovely spacious comfortable room all as we are used to with our Hilton stays always perfect Just don t touch the minibar it s electronically sensored so I d you move stuff it looks like you ve had it And it s not cheap
Staff refused to keep luggage for a few hours after checking out while nearby hotel and spa agreed to keep it even though not staying there and only having a treatment

The staff is not friendly We cannot store our luggage at the concierge for two days only if we book future rooms When we book future rooms the staff said she is charge me future room fee now then let us leave luggage in the hotel   Close to canary wharf
Trainee receptionist didn t have a clue how to check in of even check out And had no idea how to refund security deposit Still not sure if it s been done

My sheets dint get changed when I asked The Maid just did the bed   Really beautiful hotel I travel a lot and this is the best one I ve stayed in so far The price I got for my room was worth it definitely Prices have gone up but it s defiantly eorth the stay The room was huge for one person The wardrobe was massive I appreciate the little feature of a speaker being in the bathroom Overall worth it
Everything reception staff were excellent remembering my name and doing little extra touches to our stay for my partners birthday Will stay here again 0
Everything  I booked it as a surprise for my sister s 40th When she arrived the staff made her felt so special The room was beautiful decorated So thank you soo much
The only thing would be clearer directions to their parking   Everyone was super helpful and cheerful too spacious and comfortable Location perfect for this trip

Just casually mentioned to one of the staff in the lift that it was my birthday and when we arrived back in our room later that evening a small chocolate cake with candles was waiting for us A nice touch

Everything it s a beautiful hotel The staff were so pleasant and helpful The room I stayed in was so spacious the bed was comfortable I travel a lot and this is by far the best hotel I would definitely come back again

Room service the currys where cold when they got to us and for 17 each you would expect at least warm food The bed was very hard and uncomfortable  Staff where very friendly and helpful Room was lovely clean and very spacious
Expensive but mostly because it s in London Car parking over priced but again that s the London effect   Great location and typical Hilton comfort Handy for DLR and Tube

Their breakfast offered bad bananas when I were there for the first morning I asked the staff if there are good ones The response I got is good ones are already taken by other guests This kind of service attitude is absolutely not acceptable and do bad to the reputation to the hotel

The executive lounge was disappointing constant lack of plates and glasses so stood around waiting for ages for a member of staff to unlock a cupboard to get more out this seemed to be the same the last time we stayed to so I m guessing it s an ongoing issue Also food and alcohol was only available from 6pm until 8pm this time rather than until 9pm   Great location and rooms nice and spacious

The restaurant food was limited in options and very overpriced the breakfast however was good and the staff had extended the breakfast time to 11 am which was very handy THe pillows could have been more comfortable beware of booking taxi from the hotel cause a luxury taxi will arrive and charge you similar rates so specify that you need a simple taxi unless you prefer only luxury beware and avoid drinks from the mini bar very over priced   A lovely experience of our stay the lobby is nice and welcoming the rooms very spacious ours were on 11th floor so a very picturesque view of love neon skyline and the beautiful canary wharf in fact we could see tower bridge from our room as it was a river view shame we didn t stay for New Year s Eve we could have enjoyed the fireworks from our bedroom window nice and clean as well and comfortable the location is excellent as a short walk on the foot bridge you are right into a wonderful shopping mall through which one can access the jubilee line the check in and check out was easy and straight forward tesco direct just a block away so very handy THe overall feel of relatively new canary wharf was awesome especially the river side good facilities in the room such as iron mini bar beware don t use it very overpriced drinks buy yourself from the next door Tesco express tea making facilities and security box would definitely stay again

WHEN WE CAME IN I WAS TOLD 50 FROM MY ACCOUNT WOULD DEDUCTED EVERY DAY FOR THE DURATION OF OUR STAY NOT VERY PLEASED CONSIDERING WE HAD ALREADY PAID IN FULL HOWEVER THE RECEPTIONIST WAS KIND ENOUGH TO TAKE ONLY ONE PAYMENT OF 50 AND REFUND IT BACK WHEN WE LEAVE   EVERYTHING WAS PERFECT
Price increase for New Year s Eve was very hefty Triple room was meant to be 3 singles but when we arrived it was a double and a camp bed   Very clean with friendly staff
I booked in April last year requesting a high floor with river view what did I get low floor with a garage view can anyone explain hotel or booking com fault  Location value for money

From check in to check out you could not fault a thing the room was nice and big dinner in the evening was delicious and breakfast superb staff friendly and helpful Chet and Maria on reception explained everything on check in and check out fantastic stay will book again
The room was a little dark but the standard lamp was not working during our stay   Bed comfy great breakfast nice size room fabulous huge soft towels

No toothpaste in room but that s not something i can fault the hotel for   Great breakfast friendly and service minded staff and good value for money I was worried about the location a little bit but it s just a few minutes from London Bridge

The mattress in the room was so bad that my back was sore for the next couple of days after our stay compare to other hotels we stayed in poir to our visit  The staff was very friendly and helpful when we complianed about the bed issue the sort it out and gave us a off our stay and a further off our next stay that is booked for 2017 great service for the hotel Team

Not a great deal to complain about but without the access to the executive lounge the hotel ia a little short of space to relax in   The room was comfortable the breakfast was excellent and we had an excellent Christmas Dinner on Christmas Day in the hotel restaurant They gave a free upgrade to an executive room which gave us access to the lounge on the top floor The staff were absolutely excellent

First come first served parking This was not obvious on either booking com or the Hilton website Nearest car park was an 8 minute walk away not ideal with small children   Very close to South Quay DLR
The facilities only sauna and steam room gym small also the parking small space told was booked up although it wasn t  I liked the bed comfy Most of the staff accommodating breakfast was good
Food at 7am was not very hot Sausages were good but the rest was poor Hash browns only warm Black pudding nearly cold   Bed was lovely and comfortable

A bar in the Executive Lounge would be a nice way to experience the top floor   Spacious room with high quality furnishings Staff were wonderfully courteous The buffet breakfast had great choice with high quality produce

Room clean leaving the room to come back to partly cleaned room only bed was half re done towels replaced and basic Hoover Still wrappers on floor and stocks weren t filled again   Room nice breakfast and dinner food were brilliant

Excellent location for Canary Wharf check in very easy and staff very welcoming The room was extremely comfortable and clean Situated at the other side of the hotel there was no noise from the DLR which passes close by Would definitely stay there again

Hotel prices are always more expensive that is my only point 8 40 for a glass of prosecco very expensive but it s a hotel   The bed was lovely room was lovely I requested a room on a high floor which they gave us and we were given a complimentary breakfast overall stay was fantastic would highly recommend a stay at the Hilton Canary Wharf
Everything was satisfactory  The beds were very comfortable The rooms clean and presented to a very high standard Staff were extremely polite and accommodating

The attitude of the staff when we checked in was cold and rash nothing we have experienced before when staying The room stunk when we got in and on advising the staff I was reminded that they will change my room to the same category like I was looking for a free upgrade This made me very angry further more there was no bed for my son I m reconsidering my choice of hotel now   The rooms are larger than most and the hotel makes sure there is a little bed for my son Great breakfast

The window didn t open so didn t get a good night sleep Was very hot and stuffy The first night we stayed Friday 16th December 2016 Was woken up by a group of men football chanting Then all night music bring played very loud

Either better controlled heating air conditioning or ability to open windows as we woke with headaches from overheating   There is a peaceful atmosphere about the hotel We were greeted in a very friendly way by staff Our room was spacious clean and the beds very comfy Not our first stay and we d be happy to return
Bath products not enough for two persons no slippers   Very good location Superb breakfast very comfort and Modern room nice bathroom wide flat TV

bed was really comfy and staff were great we were in London to see Wicked and the ATP tour finals at the 02 the hotel is located a 5 minute walk away from Canary Wharf underground station so it was really convenient to get around the city
Room was really quiet with fantastic views Breakfast was excellent full English and continental breakfasts available on the buffet Close to DLR and tube station making location great

We found the bed to be quite hard Poor lighting at dressing table albeit there is a desk lamp this doesn t help when drying hair or applying make up   Staff were helpful polite and cheerful Breakfast was delightful choice was excellent Cleanliness of the room was excellent I requested our room be cleaned a m as I needed too rest in the afternoon this wasn t an issue was dealt with immediately

The weather was raining and the traffic in London was a nightmare And we had to leave earlier than intended on the Sunday Everything about the hotel was great   Really comfy massive bed slept better than I have for ages Lovely thick dark curtains which made it pitch black and very sleep inducing Very quiet room on the 10th floor no fan no air con no water noises from other rooms lovely Very friendly staff nothing was too much trouble We want to return for a 2 night stay as soon as we can
Fridge locked with my supper in Too tired to do anything about it Your policy on not using fridge is petty and mean especially considering room rate   Friendly staff Safe environment

Fantastic accommodation stayed here for two nights with my girlfriend to celebrate our anniversary Special thanks to Alessia Reception and Antonio Executive Lounge Manager for our upgrade and anniversary offer Was lovely to stay with you
The bed was really comfy room was great Exceptionally spacious modern and clean Staff were really friendly Very welcome feeling Would really recommend

The way booking com paid the booking It was cancelled twice as site would not process my credit card I could also get cheaper price if I dealt with hotel directly  Upgraded room with panoramic views on London and complimentary use of executive lounge

Nothing  Very helpful reception staff lovely and clean great size room with good size bathroom too Plentiful choice of good quality breakfast Although quite far out of city it is very easy to get to and only approx 10min straightforward walk from the tube station

Arrived and they could not find our booking after 30mins we found someone had changed our name on the booking which had our credit card details Apology give and offered free use of the executive lounge and breakfast which we found to be of a poorer quality and choice than the breakfast we had booked and paid for The bedroom had a standard light not working clock not working correctly and the bottle of water costing 5 50 was open Staff only offered discounts if we had extra meals Drinks which we did not want as way of compensation We have used Hilton several times before but this time they failed to please

Nothing I had a great stay and would be being picky if I said anything negative   The staff were polite and friendly My room was spacious well designed and immaculately clean I had also booked a room for my teenage daughter and her 3 friends which was of a great standard too

Only negative wasn t able to park our car so had to use other car park 10 mins away   Very helpful staff comfortable room And good breakfast Booked early so got a good rate Great value Easy access to underground to travel into to town

Nothing   From checking in to departure our whole experience was fantastic Information from booking com hadn t been sent through that there were 3 of us But a spare bed was brought in within half an hour We enjoyed the executive booking and the added bonuses that went with it the canap s drinks etc in the evening and we loved the full breakfast It set us up well for the whole day traipsing round London The beds were comfy and bathroom facilities were great Nice amount of toiletries The view from 13th floor was amazing Thank you there is nothing we could complain about other than it would have been nice to stay another night X

The bed springs in the spare bed were coming through the mattress   Great location Staff very helpful Stayed in family room which was lovely Extra bed was not comfortable but the staff made up the bed with an extra duvet which was then Fine Breakfast was top quality with many options

Could have done with an extra shower gel  Staff very friendly Room very good very clean very comfortable beds Nice shower Excellent cocktails in bar Excellent breakfast very good choices Excellent omelette made fresh Very good coffee served

Was asked if we wanted to up grade to executive lounge whichwas an extra 80 00 I did so only to find there was a time limit on the bar and breakfast up there was only continental If we wanted full English we had to eat down stairs We were there to see a show so never got to use the executive lounge as due to limited bar times it was closed so ended up paying 80 00 for nothing   friendliness of staff most of all room s very comfortable couldn t find anything too complain about at all

Directions to the o2 arena were somewhat off the mark was advised to go to Canada Water tube station in point of fact should have been in opposite direction to North Greenwich  The use of the executive lounge the staff were very helpful

The location isn t perfect for city centre but isn t far on the DLR  Excellent staff very welcoming great choice for breakfast comfortable and spacious rooms and highly competitive for London hotel prices
Just what we wanted great location to the O2 Staff were welcoming and informative Room very impressive with fantastic views over canary wharf We will be back to stay so thank you Hilton Canary Wharf

The room was a bit pricey and I think that breakfast should have been cooked to order rather than a buffet for a hotel of this calibre  I was travelling with my sister and they gave us a free twin room upgrade We were also able to check in when we arrived at 1pm
Tea making facilities in room had to lift the heavy tray out of cupboard to be able to plug kettle in  Nice large rooms Leo in the restaurant a very friendly polite man Food was excellent
Having to wait until well after 3pm for the room  The bed was comfortable The temperature was ideal The shower was good as was the tea coffee facilities

Photos don t do it complete justice The location is lovely by the water The staff were professional efficient caring and really friendly and helpful Stephanie on reception looked after us especially well Izzy the duty manager organised a surprise birthday cake for my nephew Breakfast was wonderful They had forgotten nothing Very caring I recommend this highly
Nothing it was perfect   The room was spacious and clean Hotel facilities were perfect and the staff all very pleasant Lovely breakfast with a wide choice
Loved everything and will be back next November for the tennis  Loved the price I loved the bedside reading light very neat and useful Bed very comfy Excellent shower
Hhonours I ve tried to register and thought I had some months ago However on arrival no trace of my wife s or my details   Staff were excellent

Bacon at breakfast was too fatty and stuck together   Everything about the hotel was very good Breakfast was very nice All staff were very helpful Room was spotless and very quiet I ll definitely stay again
Nothing whatsoever to dislike   Staff outstanding Nothing too much trouble Breakfast excellent Such a variety of choice Restaurant very high standard Loved everything about hotel

Painfully slow check in Just wanted to get to our room but we and the people ahead of us in the slow queue had to endure lengthy explanations Why not email guests beforehand about Hilton membership and give them a chance to fill out forms Other hotels booked through the same website have contacted us in this way before our visit   Big comfortable room Excellent breakfast with lots to choose from

Nothing   The first day Friday 11th we planned to do afternoon tea in the shard The concierge who looked after our bags gave us some advice about what was around that area and it was one of the best parts of the weekend The beds where amazing and also the breakfasts not many places have a nice cooked breakfast from a hot plate but the Hilton are an example Plenty of choice from the continent too Rooms were immaculate and they pushed ours up the cleaning ladder so we could get sorted quicker The rooms WI FI enabled me to watch the UFC in the early hours of Sunday morning without any buffering at all Much appreciated Customer for life now See you again soon
There was nothing not to like   The room was perfect for our short stay and we had everything we needed The staff were excellent and nothing was too much trouble
Nothing everything was very good would highly recommend this hote   Location excellent hotel modern clean and comfortable with good facilities Breakfast very good too

Can t fault it   Stayed at the Hilton as we were attending a concert at the o2 the nearest tube is a 2 minute walk from the hotel and the o2 arena is only 1 tube stop away so the location was perfect The hotel itself was lovely modern and stylish The reception staff were very friendly Our room was massive a gorgeous bathroom and all spotless Also great value for money Wouldn t hesitate to stay here again

My experience from the moment I arrived to when I left was really nice location is amazing lots to eat around and the staff where excellent customer service was outstanding I travel a lot and stay in luxury hotels and I must say my experience was amazing Thank you Hilton
I cannot actually think of anything   Lovely spacious room The staff did everything they could to make our stay as pleasant as possible Great location

According to their web site they have a car park which they charge 12 a night in reality you go there with your car and car park is full and all the help you can get is a piece of paper showing the nearest car park place I stay at a different hotel every Friday night and choose the hotels only if they have a car park If I knew that there s a possibility I might not park my car I definitely would not go Hilton Canary Wharf It s not ideal the park my car 10 15 min away from the hotel and walk all the way back to hotel with my high heels if this makes any sense to a men kind   Good location nice hotel
Lovely Hotel and facilities Reception staff friendly and helpful Room large clean and comfortable Bathroom had both bath I still prefer to bathe and shower Great staff we ll be back

The view from the window was another hotel room   Staff really went out of their way to help you I was ill during my stay and the staff were very patient and kind The room was also spacious and clean wish I had been well enough to enjoy it more

Food and drink was unbelievably expensive even for London Also Docklands isn t where I spend most of my time in London so it ll only be an occasional stay   Everything was spot on Comfortable quiet close to underground stations close to cafes etc Staff were polite friendly and efficient

The bed was too small and very uncomfortable Although we were told that there was parking there actually was not which was inconvenient for us The wifi connection was free but the website unclear my husband ended up paying 12 for his   The staff were friendly helpful and efficient Excellent breakfast Room facilities were good

There is a wide array of delicious options for breakfast The sausages and bacon were heavenly The bed was wide plush and very comfortable Staff make sure to aim to please Very welcoming Bathroom was pleasantly clean and spacious enough

Bathroom a bit worn Persistant stains on sink surround   Breakfast was more like a destination than Just Breakfast Room was very comfortable General layout made for efficient stay Usually stay at Greenwich but Hilton was cheaper this time round Walk to Greenwich in twenty minutes Access to underground everywhere
The room was very stuffy even with air conditioning there was not enough hot water to run a bath I was asked how my stay was going by text message No personal touch  Location
The view of the DLR track but couldn t hear it   Lovely spacious room and super kingsize comfy bed Located right by South Quay DLR station Great links to Central London Very friendly helpful staff

Bed was hard room service was warm but not hot and bathroom was tiny   Room was spacious and the staff were very friendly and helpful Breakfast was really nice and we requested extra pillows which we got promptly

WIFI is only free in the lobby It is not easily comprehensible how in today s time there are still hotels around that charge for WIFI in the rooms At least provide some limited data transfer rate WIFI for free in the rooms This is what is standard service in the other hotels I visit
To be honest there was nothing we didn t like   Location was perfect for what we had planed Not far from the underground Nd near the water With secure parking and a nice food
Had a problem and the customer service team were excellent especially the relations manager Isfarhan camball they did everything to rectify and more

Sofa bed was not very comfy could feel the springs coming through you need to check these over Paid for 3 adults only 2 coffee cups etc this needs to be checked as we were desperate for a cup of tea when we got there   friendly staff non intrusive and efficient check in out Room was well designed and a good size nice to be able to adjust temp of room

I was not happy about the 50 00 deposit that had to be paid in addition to the hotel bill when I arrived This was unexpected and takes a few days to credit back to your account after check out This should have been made clear on booking   Rooms were clean and comfortable

My daughter and her friend were not allowed in the room despite me speaking to reception to confirm my payment details as I was going to be delayed in arriving at the hotel They had to go out without changing after a long journey from Somerset When I arrived the extra bed was not in the room so had to wait for the bed to arrive and then housekeeping to make it up Reception staff have definitely read from a script without personality or any empathy We were given complimentary breakfast to compensate not being able to get into the room until late but were going to be charged 11 00 per person for room service which is totally unacceptable when I also had to wait until 9 30pm for the extra bed to be ready Beds were not comfortable at all Would not return to that hotel our experience was not a good one at all   Staff in the bar were genuinely very polite and helpful The room was spacious
That we had to leave   Great location for O2 Breakfast was wonderful and plentiful We were fortunate enough to be upgraded to an executive room and the bed was huge and so comfortable
There is nothing I could say I didn t like   Room was ideal not to big or to small Clean Comfortable Area ideal for what I wanted to do in London Great place I liked it all Very happy

Had to wait for a room had an event to attend which caused a rush also no mention of needing a deposit a lot of people didn t know anything about this including myself Took more money from card upon checking out also which caused real problems  The rooms were lovely

The price I bought 2 drinks that came to over 20 and had to wait over an hour for the room to be ready Apart from this our stay was amazing   The room was very clean and the staff were some of the friendliest I have experienced
Amazing service told them it was my bday and got a free room upgrade free breakfast and came back to the hotel to cake and a note strongly recommend

The mini bar was quite expensive especially for the can drinks  The staff were lovely and really polite me and my friend were overly pleased that we could leave our luggage at the hotel the day we checked out to carry on shopping that day and didn t have to carry our luggage around with us

Food prices are a bit of a rip off so we went elsewhere  Our room was so lovely clean tidy and comfy beds Also had everything we needed Couldn t fault it We had a nice afternoon tea too which we were very pleased with All staff were really friendly and bubbly too Not far from tube station at all

The cooks couldn t have cared less and kept disappearing so they didn t have to cook the omelettes we felt Wait staff were better But tea warm most of the time We had a hot pot of tea once only Room cleaners didn t replace teas and milk Obviously if they were gone we were using them so expected replacement The tray with the cups was not put away but left on the bench Toiletries replaced regularly though Worse was leaving the glasses dirty on more than one occassion and just putting cover back on the top I actually washed the glasses one day so I knew they were clean that day The room temperature was uncomfortable most of the time no matter what we did   The location suited me on this trip Having an ice machine was great but a bigger ice bucket would have been more user friendly

Expensive breakfast may be good but could have lunch at the Shard 33rd floor for same price Lots of places nearby for breakfast   We were off to the O2 so great location Friendly staff great facilities for short time we were at the hotel so unable to vouch for a longer stay Close to lots of places for meals shops etc
The hotel was exceptionally clean tidy and well run Staff were friendly and very helpful The room was spotless bright and airy with fantastic views A well deserved 10 10

Great welcome great facilities especially executive floors Secure pArking was great for the weekends with no congestion charge Lots of restaurants and bars within 3 mins walk and jubilee line 3 minute walk Breakfast selection was excelant

The hotel wasn t very clearly signed from the direction we travelled from There was also a slight technical hitch with the volume control for the tv sound in the bathroom   The location staff room etc were all excellent We really enjoyed our stay and would visit again There was a good choice of foods for breakfast including eggs cooked to your liking

Charge for wifi without joining a Hilton scheme Very over priced drinks and snacks from the in room mini fridge   Breakfast was varied and plentiful Perhaps two omlette chefs could help the queue along Large room comfortable bed good towels
Wanted a room with a view but the only thing g we could see was the scaffolding on the neighbouring building   Fantastic welcoming staff and excellent breakfast

Third bed in suite needs to be a single bed not a small put up bed Poor menu for room service poor choice for vegetarians On entering the executive lounge for afternoon tea we had not been informed of the two choices ie buffet or cake stands We were questioned by the waitress x 2 if we had ordered or had vouchers for this and we felt humiliated in front of a number of guests who were present at the time   Access to the Executive lounge Our suite room 305

The mess left behind by too many people at breakfast was impossible for the staff to keep up with The wifi was so complicated to try and connect to that the staff could not even manage to help me   The room was nice and clean and had lots of space and a comfy bed Cannot fault it Staff were friendly and helpful

I received a nasty scratch on my hip from the bathroom door handle which was extremely sharp Told staff member at Reception who apologised It would have been a nice touch for customer service if something could have been taken off our bill for example the car park fee which was 40 which we found expensive   Wonderful breakfast and excellent staff serving it Very helpful staff during our stay

Just there 1 night for a concert in the 02 but had to get reception to reset my room key no less than 5 times Extremely annoying we were even late for the concert because of it although the staff were very helpful  Location staff and very good breakfast

Had an issue or two with my booking and the shower was slightly below par for the rest of the room amenities   Excellent location lovely bar and lovely room Comfy beds and the executive lounge was tremendous

The cost of parking is ridiculous considering you are paying so much for the room should be an option for breakfast in the room   Customer service was excellent the breakfast was lovely and the room was great
Was lucky to get car park space limited spaces available if late booked into hotel  Staff and service excellent Great location Room lovely and clean Quite room despite noise from outside

The bath while taking a shower was a bit slippery WIFI was only free for 60 minutes   Close to Tube station clean and spacious rooms for London very spacious My window had a view on the DLR tracks but I barely heard the trains
Our room wasn t cleaned towels changed etc on the second day The staff were very helpful and quick to make things right when we told them though   Good location comfy room quiet
A few more milks and sugars Nothing troubling though really   The pillows are like clouds The small kettle so much improved on the old plastic things that used inhabit hotels

No bathroom gown n sleepers Very little stuff to have shower for a couple Very few milk sachets No welcome fruit or drink Very ordinary breakfast stuff Staff at reception refused to offer us chosen table saying it s not for use n after 5 minutes everyone is using that

We stayed at the hotel for two nights we spent majority of the Saturday morning and afternoon in the room we left our room for about 5 hours in the evening and expected upon return our room to be cleaned with fresh towels In recent experiences with other hotels it is managed that the room when unoccupied will be cleaned whatever time during the day Unfortunately this one wasn t which actually put us off using the shower on the Sunday morning Yes we could probably of called a number to get this sorted but for a hotel as pricey and with such a name as the Hilton this should be taken care of No complimentary wifi either  Good location and very friendly staff Employee Izzy checked us in and he was very helpful and greeted us with a friendly and welcoming smile He took us up to our room which was very nice of him He asked about what we had planned and have us information on how to get around the area as I was planning on taking my husband out to the o2 for his bday

I thought the breakfast was over priced from the selection we were given   The staff were brilliant Very helpful and kind Initially my room wasn t ready on check in but they made up for the inconvenience twice fold and would definitely return again

Bar prices to expensive Breakfast cold and undercooked Had to keep asking staff for things at breakfast which would normally be provided instantly such as cutlery drinks sauce etc No kids channels on TV  Spacious rooms bathroom very small though
no car park space toilets were not cleaned properly staff on the phone seems loke jyst wanna hang up on you   good comfy beds full mini bar nice views

Very far away from the city center and heathrow airport so if you are there for tourism better to get something closer to the center otherwise you ll spend half the day commuting   Amazing staff super helpful and friendly and available to provide any needed assistance The room is very comfortable as well with views over London s financial district The hotel has very fast access to the Tube line and LDR

The hotel debited my card with a 50 charge as deposit for a payment of 45 that I had indicated I wanted to pay in cash At check out since they had already deducted 50 from my account I requested that they take the 45 out of that and credit me with the remaining 5 As at the time of writing this review the 5 was still not credited back to me   Staff made an effort to address issues that were reported including offering us a complimentary breakfast as compensation for a wrongful charge to my credit card

Nothing   Booked 2 rooms for my family to stay in as I got married at their venue Check in was very good and I was able to get rooms close together and managed to get an early check in The wedding finished late my family were able to get a late check out upon request Customer service is everything and this made their stay that much more comfortable As I left them for my honeymoon I was very happy with the way all staff interacted with me Absolutely perfect stay Good value for money Reputation intact I am a Londoner so this review takes into account many other places I have stayed at and this one was worth every penny I d like to add my Bridal suite was also well and beyond excellent and the complimentary strawberries was very thoughtful Thank you once again

Really have to be nit picky but the chair in the room looked very comfortable although it was very much the opposite but very trendy   Our first contact with the hotel was a quick coffee and snack at the cafe bar The member of staff could not have been friendlier or more helpful putting together a quick snack of croissants and coffee After local errands we came back for lunch were met by a different member of staff but received the same excellent customer service The lunch 2 salads was very tasty and well proportioned The double room was a good size and we found the TV speaker in the bathroom quite amusing Bearing in mind the busy location and our room was at the front of the hotel the glazing was very effective and we slept well The buffet breakfast was also excellent with quality items The Nutella muffins were a welcome surprise treat We ll definitely be staying again at our next trip to Canary Wharf

Not exactly to do with the hotel but If the hotel parking is full there is an NCP parking lot which is about 10 12 mins walk which is 18 for 4 24 hours If you re just parking and taking public transport everywhere that may be okay but I was driving about and the cost of parking was really high May be being a little fussy here but TV was not Full HD  Very friendly and competant staff Hotel was spotless Gym sauna steam room was excellent Beautiful Location Standard room was really spacious There is a delicatessen next door named Hazev really good

Some of our anniversary arrangements hadn t been met which had been agreed hours before arrival  The breakfast was incredibly tasty and the serving staff were very helpful The room was very well laid out superbly clean and very comfortable
The view Being so close to the dock lands rail   Comfy bed Quiet Lots of space in our room Great water presure in the shower How close we were to Canary Wharf and it s facilities

We had some minor issues the shower hose was leaking the maid woke us up very early despite having a sign on the door and the room needed to be rearranged as it was set up as twin when we arrived However the guest services manager dealt with all of these issues and offered us a discount as a gesture of goodwill As a result we felt looked after and would happily stay again   Very comfortable beds clean rooms and friendly staff The afternoon tea in the Cinnamon Restaurant was lovely and felt special Despite the location way from the city centre it s a nice quiet area that s easy to get to and we had a peaceful stay Great value for the price
Fabulous room Staff are very helpful and very pleasant nothing is to much trouble for them from reception staff to waiting on staff at breakfast Superb breakfast Will definitely be back

Plenty of local TV channels with very very limited international channels i e CNN wasn t available Our special request of having 2 connected rooms wasn t confirmed until the time of checking in despite many emails earlier   Excellent location next to two underground stations Plenty of grocery and restaurant options are around Staff are helpful specially the concierge man Robin Gordon really thank you
the view from the bedroom   The room was pleasing large and airy The bed was comfortable Enjoyed the atmosphere in the Bar The breakfast always amazing choice

Very smart Clean Quiet room with a Beautiful View of the Sun setting over the Thames City and the Smile on my Girlfriends face when she entered the room and a lovely breakfast to reenergize in the morning

The lack of a decent early breakfast when I was advised by a manager the day before the Ride London event I was riding that a good breakfast could be brought to my room and I could if wanted even order a hot meal This was not I understand an option and I had to remind reception that at the agreed time of 4 45am I had not received my breakfast which arrived at 5am and was a poor takeaway I had said before that I had to leave by 5 30am for the start of the event Bearing in mind that a large number of other riders were staying at the hotel I paid for a full breakfast for that day and I received no discount On one morning I went to get my hot breakfast and my table was cleared away and it took a few minutes to get my table re laid and a new pot of coffee brought I think the default milk on the table at breakfast for health reasons should be semi skimmed not full fat I had to ask for the lower fat option   The big bedroom and very comfortable bed and the facilities available The parking on site but I think the cost per day is a bit high The helpfulness of the staff in general The good location of the hotel for getting to the West End

The hotel took from my credit card double the amount that was needed for my room and they explained that once was for the reservation once the actual payment a crazy explanation The amount was withheld for at least two weeks before being returned Quite an inconvenience to be honest especially since this makes no sense whatsoever to be charged double what you owe

we booked a family room but were instead given a smaller double room meant for another guest and overheard others complaining of the same so short changed and not compensated for it   amazing breakfast buffet modern and comfortable rooms hotel clean throughout perfect location close to canary wharf underground station shopping and restaurants free wi fi
The queue at breakfast was very long so perhaps more staff working during peak breakfast hours   Breakfast was excellent staff at front desk very helpful

No smoking area outside if you are a smoker made to feel slightly uncomfortable by passers by that I was loitering Late night frozen oven pizza and a bottle of wine cost 54   Room was great size hotel was modern and well designed

Hotel was nice just not as luxury as other Hilton hotels I ve stayed in There wasn t complimentary tea coffee or a kettle in the room and I was only given a code for 60mins of wifi which was disappointing   Perfect location and a nice hotel for a short break

If exploring central London or if you are not familiar with London and the tube system the journey here from padington Central points in London would be daunting I would stay in a different hotel if I wasn t familiar with London   Location for east London great fab location for the O2 cutty sark themes barrier etc Plenty of places to eat in the area Hotel clean and friendly nice bar area

Couldn t fault any aspect of this hotel All fantastic   The staff were so helpful and obliging On early arrival we were given the ok to check into our room early Room was modern and clean There was a huge choice at breakfast and staff were friendly
Helpful staff gave wi if password with no charge also on asking I was able to use the room s mini bar for my own items returning the hotel s products before checking out

I was only there 1 night so no hassles for me this trip Don t expect a view from the window   Great location for business users and tourists who know how to read a tube map For London the price was great value and very friendly staff

I was taking part in Prudential RideLondon 100 I was lucky to get a parking space in hotel car park but was on first come first served basis  Staff excellent with all communications when questions were asked restaurant staff very friendly and helpful breakfast choice excellent and varied

The website implied that parking was plentiful but when I go there it was all gone The option to book a space would have been great A WINDOW THAT OPENS PLEASE Even if it is a crack of fresh air out helps sleeping The air con unit was too noisy to leave it on   Comfortable and spacious rooms So often rooms on London are cramped and tiny The staff were very helpful and friendly professional and efficient I was allowed plenty of time to unload my car and to take my racing bike up with me to the room

The lighting is a bit dull and limited and on a grey London day it s a bit difficult to get ready when there s not much natural light nor good lighting inside   The room was very very spacious and comfy Staff were excellent and the hotel was very clean Very close to the station too

Mobile reception not fantastic in my room but that could of been my roaming issue Beer not cold in executive lounge but that could be my Australian definition of cold   Rooms very large working desk all the things I needed for a business trip Staff were fantastic

Probably Booking com On my original booking form I expressly stated that my wife was extremely allergic to feathers e g those in eider downs pillows etc This was totally ignored and probably not passed on to the hotel by booking com I was not joking when I say extremely allergic I will not be using booking com again   The most important factor was the location It was near the tube jubilee line and the DLR specifically Therefore easy to reach the Olympic Stadium the reason for the trip tp Lo9ndon

Very quiet and comfortable beds Breakfast very good lots of choice Area nice and easy to get into central london  Arrived at the Hilton and no record could be found of our stay made through bookings com Even though we had received regular mail from B com reminding us of our upcoming stay Brett the front of desk manager telephoned bookings com and after about an hour she finally was able to confirm our 2 rooms She was brilliant and made our stay great but so dissapointed with B com as the aHilton staff advised this happens every week so stressful for X all concernedandagency not doing their job Hotel was lovely

Staff unfriendly it was our first time at the Hilton and our view was coloured by the way we were greeted when we arrived at the hotel   Nice bed linen and lovely room although not a great view from the window

I had emailed the hotel before we arrived as my daughter had booked our weekend away as a birthday treat We were upgraded to an executive room with access to the executive lounge Thank you we really enjoyed the extra luxury
Price of a large G T   Excellent location for Olympic Park by DLR friendly staff small but functional bathroom excellent shower controllable A C very comfy bed with light duvet Superb breakfast

Beautiful modern hotel near the DLR and underground Just a couple minutes walk to shops restaurants and bars The staff were extremely helpful and the rooms were spacious clean and comfortable I would happily revisit
The air conditioning quality was not good enough especially when it was really warm outside the cooling was not good enough   The staff was really good and helpful

The downside of getting busy staff might overlook things So keep receipts if you pay within bar or restaurant so that you don t have issues of it being added to your room s charges as well It is London expect prices to be more than normal food and drinks would be about 35 40 more in London   Rooms are clean well laid out has aircon and comfortable bed Very helpful staff Love the breakfast room service option Very close to train station and local pubs and shops

I have nothing to criticise about this hotel I would happily recommend it and would stay there again   We were very happy with the hotel the rooms were large very comfortable and with extras such as iron and ironing board The staff were friendly and welcoming
Nothing everything was perfect breakfast staff were so polite and the food was lovely view was amazing and the room was to every need  Everything was perfect we would definatley return
Shower fittings worn door did not close properly was reported but not fixed Bed a little too firm  Restaurant very good Staff very friendly and helpful

No Water in the room on the first day and hairdryer did not work   The Hilton was Convenient location to all the attractions especially the 02 The staff were excellent and breakfast was superb Book an executive room with executive lounge access excellent value for money and the view over London was breath taking as it was on the 14th floor The room was on the 12th floor and was air conditioned which was very welcome
Quite difficult to navigate through the road works   Staff were friendly and helpful Car parking on site essential and travelling with wheelchair user

I have stayed in a numbers of Hilton and paid less for the night and also has gym and had a pool with sauna facility you had neither I was also charged 99 per room on my card extra on arrival as a deposit this was not brought to my attention when I checked inn I had paid fully in November last year for 7 rooms I am sure this is not legal and to put salt pin the wound it will not be credited till later in the week I will defiantly think twice before staying in Hilton again

Nothing I can think of   Our second stay here Really wonderful staff in all lovely clean room comfy bed etc and the breakfast was excellent front of house very good nothing to much trouble if you going to the o2 area just one stop away on the jubilee line Great stay again ok for us no complaints at all

Room service food was nice but not as good as I perhaps expected I was hoping for a little closer to restaurant quality whereas it was probably more pub than restaurant Malmaison for example is far better   Reception staff in particular were very friendly Same girl at check in and checkout

Rude staff and limited parking space  I remember travelling the world with my mum during holidays we d always stay in Hilton Hotels My favourite being the one in Durban South Africa I have always had a good experience with the one in Canary Wharf but my last stay was off putting due to rude Housekeeping The aircon did not function properly and asked for someone to come and have a look The young man who attended to this was extremely rude and made us feel like we were incompetent of using the aircon It was numerous to also see the genius struggle to get the aircon to work When I reported this to the receptionist she just couldn t careless However I d like to thank the concierge who assisted is with finding the nearest parking facilities

Lighting in room not great for putting on make up and styling hair before going out Could do with a mirror and optional turn on bright lights around it near a plug point in the room for hair make up   Pillows were really comfortable they always seem to be in a Hilton Location was great for the O2 just one stop on the train

Nothing Everything exceeded expectation   Beautifully kept hotel with excellent friendly helpful staff Superb breakfast Had salad for lunch in Restaurant excellent Great location close to Canary Wharf tube DLR

It would ve just been better if our rooms could ve been all on the same floor but I understand that they accommodated us best as possible   The room was lovely shower and bath were amazing use of iron board and hairdryer were good and the food at the bar was amazing

Night staff and not trained enough to accommodate requests from guests considering it is a 5 star hotel and the Hilton brand I ordered pizza in the evening and the night staff caused me too many issues at 12 30am and asked me to come down in my pyjamas and the delivery guy couldn t deliver to my room Concierge was never available for my requests Pretty poor service not sure I will be staying again unless I receive a formal apology Steam room stinks  Daytime front of desk staff are lovely
Comfortable and nice rooms with lot of space Very good breakfast Easy access to the tube Canary Wharf station Jubilee line which takes you to main sights Kind staff
DLR in front of window free wi fi only in lobby   English and continental breakfast comfortable bed good services to the city centre DLR and Jubilee line

We asked for extra milk portions and tea and we were surprised with a whole envelope full of goodies form the night staff They couldn t do enough for us and really made it a pleasant stay The location is good once you can work out which way to head out of Canary Wharf or Heron Quays stations
not enough parking for all your guests i had to park a 10 minute walk away from the hotel  bed was lovely separate shower and bath and the staff were great Overall im very happy D
No suggestions other than maybe slightly earlier check in however we were allowed to check in early anyway   I liked the funky chair and foot stool Nice for relaxing without lying on the bed
The fact I only booked one night   The room was clean and large I had a room with beautiful views and the breakfast was AMAZING I would definitely stay here again

The staff didn t even bother to make the bed properly Either service the room tidy or don t do it all Considerig the standards it was untidy the first day but after mentioning it to the front desk it was fine the next day

Bed too small for room size and 2 people room not cleaned on Sunday even though we were out from 11am to 5pm They came to clean when we came back Bath dangerously slippy Breakfast way too expensive  Location

Lack of places open in the area past midnight for food for post concert munchies   Excellent location for the o2 Very clean and well equipped rooms Staff were very friendly and helpful Excellent breakfast with great service Late check out at 12
A small bathroom old furniture and stained carpet No light in wardrobe Wi Fi not free Very over priced  The room was spacious and A C effective
Breakfast was excellent full english cereals and continental toast Staff very attentive and only 3 or 4 minutes walk from South Quay Bed very comfortable

We had two rooms one room had been fully equipped with washing toiletries like shampoo conditioner etc Towels were arranged as swans on the bed in one room whilst the other had none of this Whilst I appreciate we were able to access the room in question early to drop of luggage I still think it should have been ready By the time we got back Saturday evening it was very late my children wanted to go to sleep luckily they had toiletries in their wash kits for the next day If I had known prior to checkout I would have mentioned this at the time I am not one to complain but I was slightly disappointed   The room sizes were good a lovely breakfast

Check in staff were awful insisted I sign something that I didn t want to as in relation to my data being used and when I said I wouldn t sign she told me she couldn t check me in She clearly had never read the form and only when I asked to speak to the manager did she let me check in but she did so with a very bad attitude The room size was good but it had a small bed for the size so would have liked a bigger bed Also the layout of the bathroom was very cramped they need a different shower screen as you had to open it out to get in and out  location and bar staff in the evening very friendly and nearly made up for the bad staff at the reception

There weren t any spare pillows although we didn t ask and given how helpful the staff were I m sure they would have supplied them if we had   The room was spacious and in a fantastic location The staff were really helpful and friendly

the bathroom extractor fan was not up to the task of keeping the steam from the shower from clouding the mirror hard to shave when you can t see your face But that s a minor niggle   The whole package

Maybe some rooms have view on street work and building area but overall nothing that bad   Position perfect for Canary Whar but also for Tube access two steps from DLR and Jubilee Lone Staff very friendly and helpful Clean and well decorated

Air con only goes down to 18deg At breakfast no differentiation between tools for meat non meat use Both minor comments that would not influence my decision on whether to return   Very friendly efficient staff Fantastic location a short walk from tube and DLR and ferry Quiet room

Prior to visiting I requested to reserve parking and was told there was no need When we arrived there was no parking available and I had to drive park and then walk 1 5 miles back to the hotel   The staff were excellent the gentleman dealing with the parking was very helpful under very onerous conditions

There wasn t anything about our stay that we didn t like   The bed was enormous So comfy and we slept very well The staff on reception were extra helpful and when we called to arrange an earlier check in they advised us that they would try to have our room ready but if not we could leave our bags with the concierge which we did This meant we could walk around London without the hassle of carrying our bags around too
Staff were very helpful emails answered promptly would stay there again great location short walk for the Thames clipper shopping and restaurants and bars just across the bridge to the rear of hotel
for the lower chambers overlooking the DRL is a bit noisy no slippers in the room   perfect for a holiday staff very welcoming and helpful gladly recommend English breakfast

IT WAS A LITTLE DIFFICULT TO FIND USING GOOGLE MAPS AS THE SIGNAL GOT CONFUSED BUT THE LOCALS WERE FRIENDLY ENOUGH TO HELP  THE USE OF THE EXECUTIVE LOUNGE AND WHICH WE DID NOT EXPECT WAS COMPLIMENTARY THE VIEW WAS FAB AND IT WAS SO QUIET

The check out time is early and prices of food and drink are expensive and the bins wasn t changed we had blood sanatory towels on show in the bin from the people before us  Bedroom was nice an bed was comfortable

Need to work harder on breakfast Hot buffet no better than warm waited 10 minutes for somebody to offer us coffee More attention to detail required Fried eggs were slimy yuk   Fab room all mod cons great location next to DLR
Room could do with a revamp chipped and stained furniture in places Shower wasn t very powerful   Huge comfy bed Friendly staff Good choice in buffet breakfast
Receptionist named Wicky was so rude while checking in Operators were not picking up the call Staff of Hilton canary wharf are awful I will never prefer any of the Hilton hotel   Location

Stuffy room even with air conditioning My stand up lamp wasn t working so very dark lots of tea and coffee but only little milk all you can hear is doors banging most of the night very hard to sleep no vending machine for people that don t want to pay out for room service  The room was lovely and clean
We were upgraded so we had a suite which was super Fabulous staff they couldn t do more for us Great food comfortable would stay there again Easy access to tube
Nothing  Cheap parking 20 for 24 hours good for London great location for us right by the DLR so travel no problem nice restaurants nearby lots of bars and the O2 nearby also
The staff was very friendly at reception at parking at breakfast We had great breakfast and we recommend it The room was quite and clean all the time Congratulations

Check in process is very long winded Took 30 mins to check in to 2 rooms we had a couple of queries which were very simple to deal with yet it took a long time to sort out Dinner in the restaurant choices on the menu were quite good but extremely expensive for the amount of food you get 3 of out group of 5 had sea bass this was a very small piece of fish served with half a tomato a small mushroom and 4 green beans for 18 Rip off Although there is a great choice for breakfast unless you pre book it the night before at 12 95 per person it s 20 95 per person on the morning again this is a complete rip off  Very clean smart hotel Breakfast was excellent majority of staff were brilliant and very helpful and friendly

However just as feedback and look into so that doesn t happen the glass of juice has strong odour of egg so I have to take another glass which was OK probably mixing of egg containing crockery with glasses while washing   Bedroom associated facilities and breakfast were all very good quality

We were gutted that the late night menu didn t have more variety of food we d come from a late finish concert and were starving  The bed was amazing Easy to get to from the O2 once we worked out where to go

The complimentary even though we paid for it breakfast was not good We ate it two days in a row and each time it was either cold over cooked or distasteful   Great Hispitality I love the explanation of the rewards program The staff was very polite and informative

Breakfast was the worst we have ever had Chef who had been cooking omelettes had disappeared completely by 10 15 there were no fried eggs left and no one around to cook any Coffee was bitter and extremely strong one toaster burnt toast another wouldn t cook it at all No muesli specials available nobody interested in restocking food items Staff checking us in told us we had to have breakfast in our room and pay cash for it our room rate included breakfast She didn t even have the decency to tell us that everything was ok after she checked with Reception Very poor standard of service  Room was lovely

The light in the bathroom was very bright when using it in the middle of the night Perhaps a dimmer switch I Did pre order a birthday cake for my grandson as a surprise But it never appeared   Room service great

Nothing honestly Everything was fantastic   Our room was fantastic lovely big windows comfy bed superb facilities Big clean luxury bathroom Everything we could have hoped for All the staff particularly on Reception and serving at breakfast were really excellent Polite efficient friendly

Reception staff super friendly the moment we walked through the door Britt was so welcoming she couldn t have been more helpful Especially when we were staying there for the London marathon was just what we needed all round great hotel Definitely head back there again Good clean room great shower and great location Thanks
wifi extra and expensive bar is nothing special  excellent value for money great comfortable room location convenient good breakfast great facilities
double bed too small for 2 people carpet in room not completely vacuumed clean 30 minute breakfast room service delivery windows for business should be 15 minutes   great location good breakfast

The breakfast was amazing the staff was very kind and helpful the room was clean and the overall hotel experience was great The location should not scare you if you are willing to explore London as it is only 15min by metro and the area of the hotel is safe and calm
Didn t have any issues  Great location and so peaceful on a weekend wouldn t think you were staying in London Staff were very friendly A nice clean and comfortable hotel

I could hardly fault this hotel the one thing I would have liked was a spare blanket in the room and possibly a spare pillow some hotels offer this it got a little chilly in the night   The staff here are so friendly always have smiles on their faces too The food is delicious Salad on the burgers were very fresh succulent burgers fresh chips nothing I could complain about regarding service or food The cleanliness of the whole hotel was immaculate by far the cleanest hotel I have ever stayed in Perfect weekend away

I said on my booking that it was my daughter s 15th birthday which was the reason for the trip I had hoped something extra may have been done in room as a gesture Not a dislike more a little disappointment   Beds and pillows were lovely comfortable and clean Breakfast was superb so much choice in a relaxed atmosphere and served till late morning

Our booking have been muddled so we didn t get the rooms we were supposed to have but were then upgraded Had to go to reception 3 times before the manager came with us to open the door   Lovely sized room and good facilities The breakfast was excellent
There was nothing I didn t like   The bed was very comfortable and me and my girlfriend slept like a dream The staff were very helpful and informative
My hangover in the morning   Every single member of staff were very friendly polite and professional I actually felt valued as a customer which is rare these days Would definitely go back

some of the other guests were quite rude to staff from what I overheard and saw staff did very well to contain themselves when dealing with them  very comfy bed breakfast was lovely staff were brilliant and very welcoming I have stayed here twice for events at the O2 and I would do so again

The lighting for the bedroom was really poor Two girls traveling and trying to put on make up you cannot even tell if you put on too much blush The breakfast was ok The eggs were watery and the ham looked like it was sitting in a bowl of oil The healthy options were basically just fruit Not the worst thing that can be offered Something concerning We saw a guest lost his luggage as he was checking out of the hotel The hotel cameras did not catch anything But he lost his laptop and passport etc That was a bit concerning because his things were inside the hotel He had to stay in there longer until he could go to the embassy on the Monday   The staff was very helpful and welcoming Even during the busy breakfast buffet the staff was still very helpful friendly and always available The location was perfect we could get to everything via the tube There were enough restaurants close by to choose

It s a shame that you can t reserve parking at the hotel We parked in an ncp which was 15 minutes away and were then a bit pushed for time to get to the concert   Hotel was well located for the tube station and in close proximity to the O2

Bed was firmer than we used to but slept well after busy days out enjoying canary wharf areas   Great location for O2 arena Breakfast was beautiful from the fruit and cereal to the full english with little pastries and take home recipe for the giant muffins gorgeous Staff very friendly and helpful Went to Obica mozarella bar for a meal fabulous Many thanks for a great weekend away
Nothing 10 out of 10  Staff were very helpfully with everything we asked Room was fantastic Could not fault the location and said what was about befor booking

Nothing to complain about at all   Fantastic hotel in a great location Staff were very friendly and helpful and the hotel was spotlessly clean Tube station is just over the bridge and there are many bars and restaurants nearby

Unorganised staff put us in a double room when we booked a twin Rooms are I better than a premier inn Breakfast was disgusting bacon only cooked one side rest was a cold buffet A shot of jagermister 7 50

Very comfortable beds free fast wifi and very professional staff The breakfast buffet was to die for The hot food was always hot the selection of foods reminded me of a smorgasboard on a cruise ship Smoked salmon and ham off the bone through to a full cooked breakfast or individually made omelettes Fresh fruit and gorgeous pastries rounded things off The location offers fast and easy access to the rest of London via the London Transport network With Canary Wharf and its high class shops near by a great place to stay for a weekend in London

Andrea who was working on reception when we arrived was rude patronising and be littling towards me I was appalled at the way he spoke to me and how he dealt with my request He implied my card was going to be declined when he was refunding me I was shocked and disappointed I expected more   the location was ideal and the breakfast was to a very good standard

Nothing  The staff were extremely friendly and helpful When we arrived they kindly gave us a upgrade Nothing was too much to ask for and the breakfast the next morning was delightful Anyone going to a concert in the O2 this is ideal as it is one tune stop away 5mins Keep up the good work
Nothing It was a wonderful experience for my new husband and I   The overall experience was wonderful The staff were friendly especially Adam on night reception and the breakfast chef

We didn t get the room with a view as requested We was told breakfast on bank holiday Monday finished at 10 but guest were still coming down and being served till 11   Easy check in and room was ready ready when we arrived around 2pm

The breakfast set up The table was not fully made up No condiments or sugar and no spoons for cereal Not enough staff and tables were left dirty whilst customers queued  The room was lovely and spacious and very well equipped Comfy bed and lovely decor We were given a free upgrade which was a lovely touch
Parking not so good and would of been nice to have a pool or spa in the fitness suite   Very helpful and happy staff Very clean and comfortable hotel and breakfast was very good

Very noisy in the room could here the showers running in the other rooms and it woke us up Mini bar in the rooms are very expensive   The bed and the room were very big and the breakfast was outstanding
The sausages were not very nice and the egg wasn t cooked my partner who s birthday it was was very dissapointed with cooked breakfast The cereals etc I enjoyed

Me and my wife loved everything about the hotel for the front desk service to comfort I just didn t get the roses for my wife that I requested for but it was still and amazing stay and we look forward to coming again

Early check in wasn t available we arrived at 11am and went out for a meeting but had to return to hotel to check in at 7pm when our meeting finished instead of staying where we where which was Westminster so a night lost Bags were not even delivered to rooms and we re still in luggage room Expected more to be honest  Breakfast was 1st class lots of choice for all pallets front of house and concierge were very helpful

I am not happy with my credit card being asked for as a guarantee and me discovering that it had been used without clicking with me for a payment while I was still booked into my room I was also surprised to be phoned to ask if I was checking out when I was booked in for a further night  Adequate accomodation Check in and out OK

Poor view from our room back of hotel so no view at all Check in quite slow   Bed really comfortable room clean and warm plenty of refreshments Didn t eat in the hotel so cannot comment Excellent location for O2 arena Not the cheapest hotel I ve stayed in but as it is a high class hotel I feel we had good value for money

Stayed here for 2 nights before competing in the London marathon Comfy king size bed Lovely deep bath to relax in and lovely fluffy towels and dressing gown for afterwards Perfect place to relax before race day Fabulous choices for breakfast and lovely complementary fruit smoothies and drinks on the day for people competing in the marathon

Would have liked more milk Checking in was difficult Saw two different members of staff Conflicting procedures Disappointing that WiFi wasn t free   Clean and comfy Lovely spacious room Good size bath

The bathroom hadn t been cleaned and the toilet bowl was dirty   The distaff on the front desk were amazing wishing everyone taking part in the London marathon good luck We were also upgraded to the 14th Floor to and executive room

Breakfast service cold plates cold food little choice Yes Minister fans will recognise the British sausage Cereals unlabelled and mostly unrecognisable Nowhere suitable for mobility impaired person to sit unless part of group of 4 Ridiculous 15 charge for Internet use Desk chair too low for desk Armchair appears to have fallen under heavy lorry Only one of each for twin room TV cannot be seen from seating area TV speakers in ensuite   Reception staff excellent

We stayed the night before the London marathon We got conflicting information around what time the roads were actually going to close from reception staff and concierge In addition to absolutely wrong information on what was open and what was not In the end we left at 6 00 am on Sunday morning after a very late night just to ensure we did not get stuck as did not know what to believe Would have appreciated accurate and consistent information  location was perfect for the O2

Our room key failed on a couple of occasions but it was dealt with fairly swiftly   Staff efficient and pleasant Owing to the hotel being busy we were upgraded to an execuive room which was quiet and comfortable

Nothing keep up your high standards Well done to all  the bed and pillows so comfortable and clean my sister and myself were also upgraded I m 57 and have never been upgraded before Our stay was to take time out as it was 2 years since our mum passed away It was perfect Thanks

If I had to really think of something I didn t like I would just say I would of liked a charge point next to the bed and also free wifi in the room as the hotel itself is not cheap  All the staff we came across were extreamly accommodating making you feel really welcome the minute you enter The hotel itself was lovely Room was a great size especially for a London hotel Breakfast was beautiful a little steep in price though
No spare blankets in the room Pillows were a little too soft When switching off the lights in the room there was a ticking sound that persisted   Room was really spacious Amazingly comfortable bed

It s not in the city so taxis could potentially be expensive but it wasn t really a problem for us  Room was brilliant staff were helpful and very friendly Would definitely recommend it and would definitely stay again

The room was boiling hot and the heating could not be turned off Also you cannot open the window   Lovely breakfast Comfortable Bed Large Room and Big bathroom Great for the Sky Ride at North Greenwich and boat trips

Room abit stuffy when the fan wasn t in use   We had a room upgrade which was unexpected but fantastic The breakfast choice was fabulous The location will be excellent once the building works have finished however they did not spoil the trip

Could do with directions to hotel for when you first get there   Lovely reception staff great facilities upgraded room upon arrival Great location in heart of Canary Wharf Only 15 mins on underground to central London

hard to find coming from the tube when you dont know your way around Canary Wharf bed was very hard i could have just slept on the floor stains on the sofa bed cold morning coffee   staff was nice most of them at least breakfast was ok cleaning lady cleaned well what needed for us

None   This hotel is very clean and the room was spacious and spotless We will return again for sure By the way our receptionists Kristen provided us with very helpful travel information and was very attentive 5 stars for Kristen

Nothing I didn t like so much so I m booked in again next Friday   Friendly staff and treated to complimentary drinks when our room wasn t ready for us had to wait nearly an hour but we didn t mind we were in no rush

Took 45 minutes to check in because of a simple mistake due to the way the man on reception was trying to authorise my card Made out that It was my fault my card was declining and cost me 45 minutes on the phone to my bank when nothing was wrong and it just had to be put in a chip and pin reader instead of typed into the system Not much sympathy from the guy Just lots of assurance that it wasn t him doing it wrong Not a very nice way to make a customer feel I decided after 45 minutes of the man trying to go to a different person on check in and there Joyce and Mollie were helpful and very friendly and instead it took 30 seconds The girl Mollie seemed to know exactly what she was doing very nice girl and good at her job Lots of hassle when it wasn t needed They should make sure everyone on the check in desks knows what they re doing Also there were 3 of us staying in a family room but we only had 2 dressing gowns 2 slippers and were told the next day at breakfast that there is only 2 guests under our room number Seems to have been a system error that caused a lot of confusion over our stay   The beds were comfy even the pull out bed in our family room The breakfast was nice and the hotel was smart The staff were very helpful and friendly apart from one on arrival which immediately gave us a bad first impression The rooms were very big and soundproof couldn t hear a thing

Everything was great Pricey drinks at the bar but that was to be expected   Went to the o2 Hotel was an excellent location for this and so easy to get to from there From check in to check out the staff were friendly and went out of their way to make our stay an enjoyable one
