I didn t get offered a cup of tea until I had finished my breakfast The interest was awful it kept disconnecting me with every click I did  Nutella Muffins Breakfast was lovely many many options

Maybe a bit more dairy free snack options but made the vegetarian I was traveling with very happy   LURRRVVVEEE the executive lounge They accommodated my special breakfast request quickly and cheerfully

Hotel and Rooms were dark with subdued lighting that made it feel gloomy in all areas except Reception and the Restaurant Due to a large function in the Quayside Suite the small car park under the hotel was full and we were advised to use the nearest NCP which was half a mile away This was the only alternative and once I got there I was nervous leaving my car in the car park as it was away from the main South Quay area of Marsh Wall in a less safe area The barriers were also closed but the car park not manned or locked from 10pm to 5am so my car would have been unavailable if a home emergency had arisen in the night It was also the worst hotel breakfast we ve had for a while except for the fruit yoghurt Watered down fruit concentrate weak tea cooked breakfast was manky and barely warm tasteless and unappealing Finally the view from our room window was a building site and internal courtyard hardly stunning   Temperature in the Hotel and rooms was sensibly cool Staff attentive and efficient

Room was a bit warm Had to keep turning down temp Toilet paper holder was irritating Pillow very soft but that was actually preferred over too hard Would love to see outlets near the bed or at least the usb outlets next to the bed instead of across the room at the desk Also would be helpful if we didn t have to sign into the wifi every few hours   Comfortable room with all the mod cons Location was top notch to get to the O2 Arena The room was clean and quiet

Was offered and upgrade cheaper on arrival as the room was free suite was awsome great view on 7th floor We also ate at the resturant and the food was amazing would go back again

nothing really coffee wasnt that great  Really handy location for Canary wharf Upgrade to a very large room was an unexpected bonus friendly helpful staff

Following two nights of blissful sleep I awakened on the third morning at 4 10 am to the noise of scratching and fiddling at my bedroom door This went on a while which bewildered me but I was ok and tried to go back to sleep Then I really woke up when I heard my locked door closing and it terrified me It transpired that it was my Express CheckOut form being delivered and I can only assume whoever was delivering it simply couldn t get it underneath my door all the scratching about and had quickly opened ians closed the door to get it through easier As a lone female sleeping on top of the bed I didn t realis this and was really scared It took me a while to calm down and get back to sleep I would have rung reception to complain but needed to sleep as I was driving home that morning and so needed to relax On leaving I informed reception of my horror and dismay that this had happened and was told they would take me off Express Checkout at all their hotels so it couldn t happen again That felt like a punishment as opposed to a real apology and has actually made me reconsider staying at a Hilton in the future as I felt as though the implication was that no one else would have been worried about their door suddenly opening Totally missing the point that not only had my sleep been disturbed I then had to really work at calming down and not letting my fears run away with me It must have taken me a good ten minutes to work out why it might have happened as my initial reaction had been real fear followed by checking whether my belongings had been disturbed etc as I was half asleep and couldn t quite comprehend why my door had opened and or whether anyone had actually been in my room In the cold light of day I could tell that no one had entered but at that time I had no idea I didn t get back to sleep for well over an hour later and had to read to take my mind off how vulnerable I now felt   The location is excellent as was the room and breakfast Staff were courteous and friendly Bed and pillows so very comfortable Cleanliness couldn t be faulted
